case_title: SANG YUO DBA U & I AUTO SATETY CENTER VS. AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DENIED*** PER DEFENDANT REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANG YUO DBA U & I AUTO SATETY CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY $3,377.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,462.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-21-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF SANG YUO DBA U & I AUTO SAFETY CENTER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SANG YUO. DEFENDANT AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. PATRICK SULLIVAN A CLAIMS MANAGER WITH AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE APPEARD ON ZOOM BUT WAS INFORMED THAT THEIR ZOOM REQUEST WAS UNTIMELY FILED AND DENIED. HEARING PROCEEDED AS A DEFAULT MATTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
